description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage named build. Add a job called build_project in the build stage that executes the command `xcodebuild clean -project CarFlow.xcodeproj -scheme CarFlow | xcpretty`. Configure the job to run on runners tagged ios_10-2-1, xcode_8-2-1, and osx_10-12-3, with no additional images, services, caches, artifacts, or rules.
